summary: Fixed the second final-review UI event reducer blockers for backend-emitted SSE payloads and verified the frontend tests and typecheck pass.
tasks_completed: Updated the frontend live event reducer to apply timeline_entry payloads shaped {roundId, entry} while treating entityId as the timeline entry id.
Updated runtime_health handling to merge aggregate payloads shaped {sources: SourceHealth[]} into sourceHealth, sources, and runtime.sources idempotently.
Added focused reducer tests covering backend-shaped timeline_entry and runtime_health replay/idempotency.
